title: El Mirador Viewpoint
description: A scenic overlook offering panoramic views of the town and surrounding valleys. With its stone terraces and open skies, it’s a peaceful spot for photography, reflection, and watching the sunset over Michoacán’s rolling hills.

title: Apeo Hacienda Ruins
description: Once part of a vast agricultural estate, these ruins evoke the grandeur of 19th-century rural life. Surrounded by trees and open fields, the site offers a glimpse into the region’s economic and architectural history.

title: Maravatío Railway Station
description: Built in the late 1800s, this historic station marked the arrival of modern transportation to the region. Though no longer in full operation, its preserved structure and vintage charm make it a nostalgic stop for history buffs and train enthusiasts.
